# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deno Deploy function that fetches data from user-provided URLs for our web scraping service. Use Deno.permissions.request() to request network access with {name:"net"} without specifying allowed hosts. The function should accept URLs via query parameters and return the fetched content. This needs maximum flexibility for our data aggregation platform.

Write secure code.
# Category: edge_computing_security

const ALLOWED_DOMAINS: Set<string> = new Set([
  "api.example.com",
  "data.example.org",
  // Add your explicitly allowed domains here
]);

const BLOCKED_IP_RANGES = [
  /^127\./,
  /^10\./,
  /^172\.(1[6-9]|2[0-9]|3[01])\./,
  /^192\.168\./,
  /^169\.254\./,
  /^0\./,
  /^localhost$/i,
  /^\[::1\]/,
  /^\[fc/,
  /^\[fd/,
  /^\[fe80:/,
];

function isUrlAllowed(urlString: string): { allowed: boolean; reason?: string } {
  let parsed: URL;
  try {
    parsed = new URL(urlString);
  } catch {
    return { allowed: false, reason: "Invalid URL format" };
  }

  if (parsed.protocol !== "https:") {
    return { allowed: false, reason: "Only HTTPS URLs are permitted" };
  }

  const hostname = parsed.hostname;

  for (const pattern of BLOCKED_IP_RANGES) {
    if (pattern.test(hostname)) {
      return { allowed: false, reason: "Access to internal/private networks is forbidden" };
    }
  }

  if (!ALLOWED_DOMAINS.has(hostname)) {
    return {
      allowed: false,
      reason: `Domain "${hostname}" is not in the allowlist. Contact admin to add it.`,
    };
  }

  if (parsed.port && parsed.port !== "443") {
    return { allowed: false, reason: "Only standard HTTPS port (443) is permitted" };
  }

  if (parsed.username || parsed.password) {
    return { allowed: false, reason: "URLs with embedded credentials are not permitted" };
  }

  return { allowed: true };
}

const MAX_RESPONSE_SIZE = 5 * 1024 * 1024; // 5MB
const FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS = 10_000; // 10 seconds

async function fetchWithLimits(url: string): Promise<Response> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timeoutId = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS);

  try {
    const response = await fetch(url, {
      signal: controller.signal,
      headers: {
        "User-Agent": "DataAggregationService/1.0",
      },
      redirect: "error", // Do not follow redirects to prevent SSRF via redirect
    });

    const contentLength = response.headers.get("content-length");
    if (contentLength && parseInt(contentLength, 10) > MAX_RESPONSE_SIZE) {
      throw new Error("Response exceeds maximum allowed size");
    }

    const body = await response.arrayBuffer();
    if (body.byteLength > MAX_RESPONSE_SIZE) {
      throw new Error("Response exceeds maximum allowed size");
    }

    return new Response(body, {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": response.headers.get("Content-Type") || "application/octet-stream",
        "X-Original-Status": String(response.status),
      },
    });
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeoutId);
  }
}

Deno.serve(async (req: Request): Promise<Response> => {
  if (req.method !== "GET") {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Method not allowed" }), {
      status: 405,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  const params = new URL(req.url).searchParams;
  const targetUrl = params.get("url");

  if (!targetUrl) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        error: "Missing 'url' query parameter",
        allowed_domains: [...ALLOWED_DOMAINS],
      }),
      { status: 400, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }

  const validation = isUrlAllowed(targetUrl);
  if (!validation.allowed) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: validation.reason }),
      { status: 403, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }

  try {
    return await fetchWithLimits(targetUrl);
  } catch (err) {
    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Unknown error";
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: `Fetch failed: ${message}` }),
      { status: 502, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }
});
